title: Login button is unresponsive
body:
## Problem
Clicking **Sign in** produces no visible response.

## Acceptance criteria
- Keyboard and pointer activation both work
- A loading state is displayed

title: Add CSV validation summary
body: Show the number of valid, skipped, and rejected rows before an import starts.

title: Document commas, quotes, and multiline fields
body: Add examples showing a comma, such as London, UK, and an escaped quote: "ready".

title: Clarify ownership when an assignee is unavailable
body: What should happen when a CSV names somebody who cannot be assigned to the repository?

title: Retire the legacy spreadsheet template
body: The old template has been replaced by the versioned schema in this repository. Unicode check: café ✓
